title: Mild Fluffy Algerian Brie Gratin
description: A gentle, airy gratin of brie coated in a wine-infused herb crust, finished in an air fryer for a crisp, crowd-pleasing dish that balances bold flavors with anti-inflammatory ingredients.
instructions: Slice the brie into four equal wedges and set aside.
In a small saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat, add minced garlic, thyme, rosemary, and turmeric, and sauté for 1 minute.
Pour in the red wine, bring to a simmer, and let reduce by half until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from heat and mix the breadcrumb and walnut mixture into the wine sauce until well coated.
Brush each brie wedge with the wine sauce mixture, making sure to cover the top surface completely.
Arrange the coated brie wedges on a parchment-lined air fryer basket, ensuring they do not overlap.
Air fry for 12 minutes or until the top crust is golden brown and the cheese is bubbling.
Remove from the air fryer, sprinkle with sea salt and pepper, and serve immediately.
